title: chat.inbound-command
description: Section 16 Phase 12 Track B: the normalized shape every chat trigger adapter (apps/telegram-adapter, apps/whatsapp-adapter) parses its channel-specific inbound message into, before calling the public REST API. Keeping this shared and channel-agnostic is what lets a second channel (WhatsApp) reuse the same command handling without growing the API surface per channel. This schema governs the adapter-internal representation only -- it is never itself sent over talos.events or persisted; each adapter validates its own parser output against it in tests.

chat_id.description: Channel-native chat/sender identifier, checked against the operator allow-list before any command executes.

project_name.description: CREATE_TASK only: resolved against GET /api/v1/projects by name (case-insensitive) to find project_id.

title.description: CREATE_TASK only: the new task's title.
